name: bull-em
description: A real-time multiplayer bluffing card game combining Liar's Dice with poker hand rankings

scripts.dev: npm run build -w shared && concurrently "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && node scripts/validate-cfr-strategy.mjs && npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
